query:
SELECT 
  o.customerId,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.shippedAt >= '2025-09-09 00:00:00' AND o.shippedAt <= '2026-03-08 23:59:59' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ordersIn6m,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.shippedAt >= '2025-03-08 00:00:00' AND o.shippedAt < '2025-09-09 00:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ordersIn6to12m
FROM orders o
WHERE o.orderStatus != -1
  AND o.isShipped = 1
  AND o.shippedAt IS NOT NULL
  AND o.customerId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.customerId
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user VDyW8BBNx15QJxW.root --database DN8ihETPKNPmGxAqBwYu7X --execute SELECT 
  o.customerId,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.shippedAt >= '2025-09-09 00:00:00' AND o.shippedAt <= '2026-03-08 23:59:59' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ordersIn6m,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.shippedAt >= '2025-03-08 00:00:00' AND o.shippedAt < '2025-09-09 00:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ordersIn6to12m
FROM orders o
WHERE o.orderStatus != -1
  AND o.isShipped = 1
  AND o.shippedAt IS NOT NULL
  AND o.customerId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.customerId
LIMIT 10;
